findings.title: North Star Metric: Events Processed Per Day
findings.description: This metric represents the total number of events processed by the DataPipe platform daily, serving as a key indicator of the platform's overall performance and user engagement.
assumptions: The current processing capacity is sufficient to handle the projected growth in events.
recommendations: Monitor this metric closely to ensure it scales with user demand.

findings.title: Primary KPI: Services on EOL Dependencies
findings.description: This metric tracks the number of services relying on end-of-life dependencies, indicating potential risks in the platform's stability and security.
assumptions: All services are accurately reported and monitored for dependency status.
recommendations: Develop a remediation plan for services on EOL dependencies.

metadata.measurement_method: Count of services using EOL dependencies

findings.title: Guardrail Metric: Critical CVEs Open
findings.description: This metric counts the number of critical Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) that are currently open, serving as a guardrail to ensure platform security.
assumptions: All CVEs are tracked and reported accurately.
recommendations: Implement a process to address critical CVEs within a defined timeframe.

findings.title: Instrumentation Gap: Dependency Health Monitoring
findings.description: There is currently no centralized view of dependency health across the platform, leading to reactive management of EOL and CVE issues.
assumptions: A centralized dashboard can be built and integrated with existing tools.

evidence.excerpt: There is no centralized view of dependency health across the platform.

recommendations: Create a dependency health dashboard and integrate with automated alerting tools.

findings.title: Experiment Opportunity: CVE Resolution Time
findings.description: Conduct an experiment to measure the impact of implementing automated CVE alerting on the resolution time for critical vulnerabilities.
assumptions: Automated alerting will reduce the time taken to address CVEs.
recommendations: Set up an A/B test comparing resolution times before and after implementing automated alerts.

summary: The analysis identified key metrics for monitoring the performance and security of the DataPipe platform, including a North Star metric focused on event processing. Gaps in dependency health monitoring were highlighted, along with recommendations for improving CVE resolution times through experimentation.
